title: Northline Art Direction
subtitle: Image direction for an outdoor lifestyle launch.
description: A restrained image direction system for a launch campaign balancing technical product information with quiet landscape-led storytelling.

blocks.text: The campaign language needed to avoid exaggerated adventure tropes. We focused on texture, utility, and measured pacing across launch imagery.

blocks.caption: Lookbook direction with product, landscape, and texture pairings.

blocks.quote: Every frame should feel like a useful object in a real place.

blocks.title: Outcome
items: A launch image kit covering product pages, editorial features, and social teasers.
A simple art direction guide for future seasonal shoots.
A quieter campaign tone that still kept product function visible.
